mapper.select: /** UsptReprtDao.select */ select reprt_id , last_slctn_trget_id , reprt_type_cd , reprt_sttus_cd , reprt_sumry_cn , attachment_group_id , makeup_req_de , makeup_req_cn , makeup_attachment_group_id , presentn_dt , sndng_mth , sndng_cn , recent_send_date , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_reprt where reprt_id = #{reprtId}

/** UsptReprtDao.selectBasic */ select ur.reprt_id , ur.reprt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_sttus_cd) as reprt_sttus , ur.reprt_sumry_cn , ur.attachment_group_id , ur.presentn_dt , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpa.member_id , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(ubpa.member_id) as member_nm , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubpat.rspnber_nm , ubpat.enc_mbtlnum , ubc.charger_author_cd from uspt_reprt ur inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ur.last_slctn_trget_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs on ubjs.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubjs.job_step_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@JOBSTEP_TASK}' inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} where ur.reprt_id = #{reprtId}

/** UsptReprtDao.selectListCount */ select count(*) from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs on ubjs.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubjs.job_step_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@JOBSTEP_TASK}' inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_reprt ur on ur.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id and ur.reprt_type_cd = #{reprtTypeCd}

/** UsptReprtDao.selectList */ select ur.reprt_id , ur.attachment_group_id , ulst.last_slctn_trget_id , presentn_dt , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_sttus_cd) as reprt_sttus , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ub.bsns_year , ub.bsns_nm , cm.member_nm , ubc.charger_author_cd , cm.member_id , cm.enc_email , cm.enc_mobile_no , row_number() over (order by ulst.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ub.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_job_step ubjs on ubjs.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubjs.job_step_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@JOBSTEP_TASK}' inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc on ubc.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_reprt ur on ur.last_slctn_trget_id = ulst.last_slctn_trget_id and ur.reprt_type_cd = #{reprtTypeCd}
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptReprtDao.selectFrontListCount */ select count(ur.reprt_id) from uspt_reprt ur inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ur.last_slctn_trget_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true

/** UsptReprtDao.selectFrontList */ select ur.reprt_id , ur.reprt_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_TYPE_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_type_cd) as reprt_type , ur.reprt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_sttus_cd) as reprt_sttus , ur.presentn_dt , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubpat.rspnber_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm from uspt_reprt ur inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ur.last_slctn_trget_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptReprtDao.selectFront */ select ur.reprt_id , ur.reprt_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_TYPE_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_type_cd) as reprt_type , ur.reprt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', ur.reprt_sttus_cd) as reprt_sttus , ur.presentn_dt , ur.reprt_sumry_cn , ur.attachment_group_id , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpat.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubp.pblanc_nm from uspt_reprt ur inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ur.last_slctn_trget_id and ulst.slctn = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id and ubp.enabled = true where ur.reprt_id = #{reprtId}
